ddt:Target.Name: TCU_AIVC2_v1.2
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ********************
V1.0_Draft 18/10/2019 Suresh Babu Initial version for AIVC2 and this version is based on TCU_AIVC_v2.24.xml DIDs $5002 , $5003, $5004, $5005, $5006, $5007, $5008, $5009, $500A, $500B, $500C are added DID $0100 - DID name changed to Ethernet connected input line DID $C000 - DID name changed to Ethernet Timeout DID $401C - DID name changed to Ethernet Definition DTC $AE13 - DTC name is updated as HU/Navi Ethernet DID $6000 - DID Byte2 - Bit 2 is updated with the DTC $AE13 - HU/Navi Ethernet
V1.0 15/11/2019 Suresh Babu The IP and MAC address are updated correctly The Diag Version is updated as $34 The Logical Address is updated as 0077
V1.1 24-03-2020 Suresh Babu The below changes are with respect to DRC26_SPEC_DIAG_A-IVC2_V1.2 The DTCs from $AE39 to $AE48, $AE50 ,$AE51, $AE17 and $AE21 are removed DTC $AE38 is modified from Vnext Master Authentication Ok to Part Authentication Error DID $159 is removed since the state manager has been updated on SOP3 in such way that IVC update will be possible without having to use the DIAG command DID $333, $334 are added $5002 is replaced by $4400, $5003 is replaced by $4401, $5004 is replaced by $4405, $5005 is replaced by $4406, $5006 is replaced by $4407, $5007 is replaced by $4410, $5008 is replaced by $4411, $5009 is replaced by $4413, $500A is replaced by $4414, $500B is replaced by $4415 $500C is replaced by $4416
V1.2 17-05-2020 Suresh Babu Addition of DIDs - $4165, 4223, 4224, 4225, 4226 - CM6.51 -$4228, $4229, $4230, $4231 - CM6.6 Removed of DIDs - $4145, $4146, $407A, $407B, $416F - CM 6.3 - $4416, $4058 - CM 6.3 - CM 6.5 - $4003 , $4004 -CM 5.2.1.3 Routines $870B and $8712 are updated DiagMux DTCs are updated DID $4153 resolution is changed from 0.001 to 0.01

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Lost communication with Hand Free Module
Lost communication with Electronic Control Moteur
Lost communication with Hybrid Electric Vehicle Control
Lost communication with Electronic Stability Control (VDC)
Lost communication with Body Control Module
Lost communication with Airbag Control Unit
Lost communication with Electric Powered Steering
Lost communication with Underhood Switching Module
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: VIN (Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory)

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Description: The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record. The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring
Data.Comment: Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring
Data.Mnemonic: Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring

Item.Text: no file detected on Ethernet device
file on Ethernet not compatible with current content of the part
ECU internal failures ( This is applicable for values $20 to $29)
End of Life of the Battery
No automatic eCall has ever been detected before
Not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
Not registered, MS currently searching for a base station
Not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
Not registered, MS currently searching for a base station

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Emergency
Data.Comment: Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Emergency

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Compatible
Data.Comment: Services provisioning.Charge spot finder 24 points Compatible

Data.Comment: Services provisioning.Charge spot short term booking
Data.Mnemonic: Services provisioning.Charge spot short term booki

Data.Name: Services provisioning.GBA.Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer doesn’t pay upgrade
Data.Comment: GBA : Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer doesn’t pay upgrade

Data.Name: Services provisioning.Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone
Data.Comment: Services provisioning.Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone
Data.Mnemonic: Services provisioning.Low battery alert upgrade on

Data.Name: Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out
Data.Comment: Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out
Data.Mnemonic: Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out

Data.Name: Max Time to Send Random Upload
Data.Comment: Max Time to Send Random Upload
Data.Mnemonic: Max Time to Send Random Upload

Data.Name: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#1
Data.Comment: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#1
Data.Mnemonic: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROB

Data.Name: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#2
Data.Comment: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE Vehicle Status#2
Data.Mnemonic: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROB

Data.Comment: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROBE SC Precond
Data.Mnemonic: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.activate PROB

Data.Name: Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START
Data.Comment: Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START
Data.Mnemonic: Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START

Item.Text: False (callback request by sms is not allowed)
True (callback request by sms is allowed)
No retry until next ON cycle

Data.Name: PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation services byte.deactivate PROBE Charging status
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivationservice byte.deactivate PROBE Vehicle Status#1
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation service byte.deactivate PROBE Vehicle Status#2
PROBE DAI Services Activation Status.Deactivation service byte.deactivate PROBE SC Precond

EV DAI Services Activation Status.Activation services byte.activate Contract Certificate
